synopsis: The Yuuzhan Vong install the Corellian governor-general Thrackan Sal-Solo to run the collaborationist Peace Brigade from the planet Ylesia. The world becomes the target of a retaliatory strike by the New Republic, with a small Jedi team, including Jacen and Jaina Solo, landing ahead of the main assault to free prisoners. The Jedi succeed, capturing Sal-Solo along with Senator Pwoe, the self-styled acting Chief of State, who reveals himself to be an enemy collaborator. The Jedi escape before the Yuuzhan Vong can rally their forces, breaking the back of the Peace Brigade movement.
title: Ylesia
